title: chrysopsis alba
intro: Chrysopsis alba, also known as Silver Ragwort, is a flowering plant native to the eastern United States and Canada, characterized by its white or yellowish flowers and silvery-gray foliage. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Chrysopsis alba are said to include relief from arthritis, eczema, and other skin conditions, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Chrysopsis alba can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, allowing for various forms of supplementation and treatment.
